item.title: History
item.description:
And yet, the majority of Iranians will welcome Americans into their homes with loving grace. The late Anthony Bourdain said it best: "You tend to kill your guests with kindness around here," emphasizing the overabundance of homecooked meals offered and the overwhelming warmth of strangers. It's a level of hospitality he compared to all his years of travelling.
MV Edit: please send me pics of books you recommend
item.dc:creator: unwaver

item.title: Wednesday MEME DUMP To Make You Laugh #811
item.description:
1
2. When the Elote is too good
3. What gender is that
4. Comedian working the crowd
5. Stroke had I
6. Being me IRL be like
7. Star Wars deleted scene
8. Me when I go to a foreign restaurant and have no idea how to eat the food
9
10. Mouse survival strat
11. These filter photos are getting wild
12. She literally doesn't give a fuck and was tired of the snake's BS
13
14. Now that's a talented girl!
15. Thank you for making it to the end of this dump, I hope you were thoroughly entertained! I would like to share with you that I'm making a realistic bodycam-style psychological horror game, based on one of the most disturbing real life experiments in history. You are tested by a mysterious figure. Trough your choices the game explores themes of obedience to authority, cruelty and necessary moral dilemmas Please wishlist if it is something that interests you: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2719670/The_Milgram_Experiment/ Thank you for supporting indie devs!
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii

item.title: Please Help my Wonderful Wife
item.description:
This is Keisha, she suffered a massive heart attack last Friday, died once and was thankfully brought back but is on critical life support. She is currently on intubation and ECMO to recover from a pulmonary embolism. All she wanted was to correct a 20 year old ACL injury in her knee that had kept her from being active and was causing her hip pain, so she got the surgery to graft a portion of her knee tendon to replace her torn ACL. Unfortunately she was incredibly unlucky to form clots thats traveled to her lungs and hospitalized her. I want everyone who sees this post to know a little about my wonderful partner in life. She's an optician at a vision center, but has wore many hats, once being a pharmacy technician and a phlebotomist. She's a wonderful artist who likes to crochet, paint, pin bugs and do all kinds of creative things. Her favorite game series is Animal Crossing, enjoys shows like the x files, murder she wrote, and likes to watch automotive youtube channels where they revive junky old cars and tractors. Her favorite genre of books is classic scifi and her favorite genre of movies is classic action films. She is my everything, and im devastated and very scared, I didnt want to set up a go fund me or anything like but my sister law did it and theres no reason to not accept help from people who mean well. So if you want to consider helping us raise money for what will inevitably be a huge medical bill please consider donating here. https://www.gofundme.com/f/keishas-fight-overcoming-a-heartbreaking-crisis?attribution_id=sl:7116e414-eb78-4706-9ed0-bd624d1737fc&lang=en_US&ts=1750806758&utm_campaign=fp_sharesheet&utm_content=amp13_t1-amp14_t2-amp15_t1&utm_medium=customer&utm_source=copy_link&v=amp14_t2
I dont want to be one of those people who post a picture of my wife in a hospital bed with all the life support attached to her, she wouldn't want to be seen that way. So here's a lovely picture of us at a dinner train. I just want to hear her voice again.
item.dc:creator: AgentPaperCraft

item.title: Carefully Curated Crap, Vol. 524
item.description:
1
2
3
4
5
6
7
8
9
20
11
12
13
14
15
16
17
18 There is, but it'd be funny.
19
20
21
22
23
24
25
Man Tax: Jacob Hankin “Reputation is what other people know about you. Honor is what you know about yourself.” ― Lois McMaster Bujold, A Civil Campaign I try to keep my posts "good vibe zones". So, instead of finding the one thing in here you don't like and commenting on it, maybe let it go, don't comment on it and find something that you do like. Love you long time. So, I made a discord server so you guys can donate memes to the museum for future CCC posts. I don't want to run out! Also, we can hang out, play some trivia, talk about movie & tv. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ If there's an AI image or two in my posts, give me a break on it. I don't post them intentionally.
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.title: Casual browsers noticing that The Weirdness™ is returning to UserSub
item.description: FP Edit: please join us! There's a lot that we cannot change about imgur, but we can recover that UserSub feeling of never knowing quite what you might see, so make it weird with me. Stay fresh, cheese bags.
item.dc:creator: GhostTater

item.dc:creator: abortmemom

item.title: Painted myself as the Silver Surfer - MCroft07
item.description: Thanks for all the nice comments, it's appreciated. Now for the big whammy faq Faq: I use body paint and do these in a mirror No, it is not AI I don’t recreate the reference photo like for like so I’ve put in a photo, but I prefer to change parts of the design to make it more “my version”. I paint them live on twitch! My chat are super kind, thanks to everyone who has joined my community since finding me here! :) I use professional body paint covers (pasties) this means I am not wearing a top but I am also not naked. I paint myself, I make the props myself, I film myself, and I also edit. This is my full time thing now (yayy) I paint these by looking in a mirror, with brushes, and paint It takes between 6-12 hours each Body painting myself is my hobby/passion I do own clothes It doesn’t tickle “Why don’t you just wear clothes” once again, body painting myself is my hobby/passion. I am painting my skin, I am not wearing a suit - but that does not mean I am naked. I know, even I think this is a ridiculous set of questions I have to constantly answer I did not go to art school, I am self taught. Talent gets you so far, but this is a learned skill. I couldn't care any less that you don't like my camera movements on the video, there are billions of videos on the internet, watch something else then The paint isn’t edible (gross) I've been painting myself for 16 years. The 07 does not mean I was born in 2007, UK 7 is my shoe size No, I don't need help painting my back, I don't want to paint my back, I don't need to paint my back. (also gross) No, I don't need help washing it off. (also you are gross) If you want to see more I am MCroft07 on IG, twitter, Tiktok, YouTube I like doing the lip syncs, they're fun for me while I paint them. I couldn’t care less if you think they’re cringe. I am cringe but I am free My tattoos on my ribs are from Tomb Raider - I am a big TR fan I do not have an OF but if you want to send me money THAT badly you can just tip my twitch account. Haha. The shower afterwards takes about 15 minutes, I use a regular sponge and shower gel. I'm not interested in trying to paint the inside of my mouth. I have mouth fx, I use it for horror stuff and it makes your poo green. I like breaking the illusion. The reason why it can look different at the end is because I am wearing a wig, I promise you it is not a different person because the hair changed. While on this topic, if my eyes change colour it’s because I am wearing contact lenses. (Those with an IQ above 10… I know. Even I’m shocked the wig thing is a frequent comment). I use body paint. It doesn’t tickle, I am very ticklish and this is fine. I don’t have an allergic reaction to the paint, but if you do it, you should always do a patch test first I do not know where you can buy body paint in every country. I know in the UK it is available at FacePaintingshop.com. I use a plethora of different brands, it’s best to search for them yourself online. I don’t work in Hollywood, I don’t want to. I just want to improve my body painting for myself. I am English, not American. I do not go outside like this to scare people. 1, that would be very cold. 2, in this current age, everyone would take photos without me knowing and it would likely dox me :)))))) I’m not a sweaty person, but if I was this would be a lot more difficult. Thank you to those of you who came from Imgur to my Twitch channel! “What’s the point in painting yourself when you can wear clothes?” all my clothes are in the laundry, had to resort to this, tough life It would not be quicker to jump into a pool of paint - think of the drying time?! If you're still here I’m on a 5 day exercise streak and I'm very proud of myself! I don’t care that I wash it off at the end, I get to reuse this canvas, we love a reduce, reuse, recycle queen. I am not the lady who did the Maneskin video, it’s a cool video and she slayed, but it isn’t me. I can promise you there is not *a man* painting these and I am pretending to paint myself. I am genuinely painting myself. I know a lot of you don’t like reading this faq because it is horrid to see that I have to answer all of these. Unfortunately I have noticed that when I don’t put in all the icky things then I get more gross comments and I just have to spend more time blocking people so it’s better to call it out. I just copy and paste it each time anyway.
item.dc:creator: MCroft07

item.title: What Happened Today #145
item.description: ?‍☠️ Deportation architect Stephen Miller owns stock in the data company tracking immigrants. Trump's former lawyer, now up for a lifetime federal judgeship, allegedly told government attorneys to ignore court orders. Trump himself owes $83.3 million but suddenly claims immunity he previously waived. Grift has always been Trump's brand, but now his aides and enablers are getting their cut too. Meanwhile grocery prices haven't budged in five months despite his Day One promise to bring them down. This is systematic looting where competence doesn't matter as long as you're personally profiting or ideologically loyal. The people still defending legal standards and institutional knowledge are fighting to save what's left of actual governance. Call your representatives and demand they support every agency head, judge, and civil servant who's still enforcing the rules before there's nothing left to defend. Don't rely on the algorithm to keep you informed. Let me send this to you every night, free and private, so that you always know what's going on. Add your email at https://govbrief.today or find us on Substack at Gov Brief Today. #GovBrief #Resist 1. https://go.govbrief.today/iran-nuclear-not-obliterated 2. https://go.govbrief.today/ceasefire-broken-but-holds 3. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-mocks-iran-online 4. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-republishes-nato-leader-text 5. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-nato-uncertainty 6. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-meet-zelenskyy-hague 7. https://go.govbrief.today/gaza-food-charity 8. https://go.govbrief.today/acip-member-quits 9. https://go.govbrief.today/judge-injunction-ev-chargers 10. https://go.govbrief.today/nsc-restaffing-after-cuts 11. https://go.govbrief.today/public-safety-benefits 12. https://go.govbrief.today/bove-ignore-court-orders 13. https://go.govbrief.today/bombing-suspect-dead 14. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-impeachment-vote 15. https://go.govbrief.today/iran-briefing-canceled 16. https://go.govbrief.today/abrego-garcia-freed-wednesday 17. https://go.govbrief.today/melgar-salmeron-ordered-returned 18. https://go.govbrief.today/big-balls-quits 19. https://go.govbrief.today/miller-owns-palantir-stock 20. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-claims-immunity-carroll Yesterday's Story - https://go.govbrief.today/cbp-beats-man Fighting Back - https://go.govbrief.today/states-sue-trump-over-funding Subscribe for Free - https://govbrief.today **Hey, Imgur, back later on Wednesday. Been a hectic start to the week, but I will catch up on comments then. Have a great day!
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: Still pissed though
item.description: I'm a dude before anyone asks. I hate that he is catfishing people with my stuff though. I also hate that he's posting it to communities where it doesn't make sense to exist, like a BBC community when I am VERY white and quite average.
item.dc:creator: imredheaded

item.title: Save the bumblebees
item.description:
Just over a couple of weeks ago, I rescued a disabled Bumblebee called Beelinda and looked after her until she passed on. I posted about it on various social media and asked for people to donate to The Bumblebee Conservation Trust at https://www.bumblebeeconservation.org/join-and-donate/donate/ In a little under 24 hours, they raised £3000 in donations. Please donate if you can. If the bees die, we die. We need to help them all as much as we can.
Beelinda enjoying fresh flowers.
Having an explore of her AirBeeNBee
nom nom nom
Having a drink of yummy nectar
She loved exploring the flowers I brought her daily
She loved purple and blue flowers most
item.dc:creator: vbloke
